# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { EdgeConfig } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
  regions: ['iad1', 'sfo1', 'gru1'],
  memory: 1024,
  maxDuration: 30,
};

export default async function handler(request: Request) {
  // Default values
  const defaultConfig = {
    API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
    DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
    FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: false,
    FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: true,
  };

  // Read from Edge Config with fallback to defaults
  const edgeConfig = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;
  
  if (!edgeConfig) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG not set, using default values');
    return new Response(JSON.stringify(defaultConfig), {
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }

  try {
    // Validate Edge Config URL format
    const configUrl = new URL(edgeConfig);
    if (!configUrl.protocol.startsWith('https')) {
      throw new Error('Edge Config must use HTTPS');
    }

    // Fetch config from Edge Config
    const response = await fetch(edgeConfig, {
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${process.env.EDGE_CONFIG_TOKEN || ''}`,
        'User-Agent': 'Vercel Edge Function',
      },
      next: { revalidate: 60 },
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Edge Config fetch failed: ${response.status}`);
    }

    const edgeConfigData = await response.json();
    
    // Merge with defaults
    const finalConfig = {
      API_KEY: edgeConfigData.API_KEY || defaultConfig.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: edgeConfigData.DB_URL || defaultConfig.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI: edgeConfigData.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI ?? defaultConfig.FEATURE_FLAG_NEW_UI,
      FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS: edgeConfigData.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS ?? defaultConfig.FEATURE_FLAG_ANALYTICS,
    };

    // Security: Validate config values
    if (!finalConfig.API_KEY || finalConfig.API_KEY === defaultConfig.API_KEY) {
      console.warn('Using default API key - this may be a security risk');
    }

    if (!finalConfig.DB_URL || finalConfig.DB_URL === defaultConfig.DB_URL) {
      console.warn('Using default database URL - this may be a security risk');
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify(finalConfig), {
      headers: { 
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Cache-Control': 'public, max-age=60',
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Edge Config error:', error);
    
    // Return default config on error
    return new Response(JSON.stringify(defaultConfig), {
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
  }
}

// Security middleware
export const middleware = (request: Request) => {
  // Validate request origin
  const origin = request.headers.get('origin');
  if (origin && !origin.includes('vercel.app')) {
    return new Response('Forbidden', { status: 403 });
  }

  // Rate limiting (basic implementation)
  const rateLimit = request.headers.get('x-rate-limit');
  if (rateLimit && parseInt(rateLimit) > 100) {
    return new Response('Rate limit exceeded', { status: 429 });
  }

  return undefined;
};
